words.definition_vi: thay đổi hoàn toàn hình dạng, tính chất hoặc chức năng của cái gì; biến đổi
words.definition_en: to change completely in form, nature, or function
words.example_sentence: Digital technology has transformed the way students access educational resources and collaborate with peers globally.

words.definition_vi: quá trình hoặc kết quả của sự thay đổi hoàn toàn; biến đổi
words.definition_en: the process or result of changing completely
words.example_sentence: The transformation of rural areas into urban centers has raised concerns about environmental sustainability and cultural preservation.

words.definition_vi: có khả năng hoặc tác dụng thay đổi hoàn toàn; mang tính chuyển biến
words.definition_en: causing or capable of causing a complete change
words.example_sentence: Artificial intelligence is considered a transformative technology that will reshape industries and labor markets in the coming decades.

words.definition_vi: đóng góp, cung cấp một phần để giúp đạt được mục tiêu chung
words.definition_en: to give or provide something as a part of a joint effort
words.example_sentence: Multiple factors contribute to climate change, including greenhouse gas emissions from industrial activities and deforestation.

words.definition_vi: điều được đóng góp; phần đóng góp vào một mục tiêu chung
words.definition_en: something given or provided as a part of a joint effort
words.example_sentence: The contribution of renewable energy sources to the global energy mix has increased significantly over the past decade.

words.definition_vi: là một trong những nguyên nhân hoặc yếu tố dẫn đến kết quả nào đó
words.definition_en: to be one of the causes or factors that leads to a result
words.example_sentence: Poor diet and sedentary lifestyle contribute to the rising prevalence of obesity and cardiovascular diseases in developed nations.

words.definition_vi: xuất hiện, nổi lên, phát sinh; trở nên rõ ràng hoặc được biết đến
words.definition_en: to come into view or become apparent; to arise or develop
words.example_sentence: New social media platforms continue to emerge as younger generations seek alternative spaces for digital communication and self-expression.

words.definition_vi: sự xuất hiện, sự nổi lên; quá trình trở nên rõ ràng hoặc được biết đến
words.definition_en: the process of coming into view or becoming apparent
words.example_sentence: The emergence of artificial intelligence in healthcare has prompted ethical discussions about data privacy and algorithmic bias in medical diagnosis.

words.definition_vi: làm cho dễ dàng hơn; tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho việc gì
words.definition_en: to make something easier or help it happen
words.example_sentence: Online learning platforms facilitate access to quality education for students in remote areas who lack traditional schooling infrastructure.

words.definition_vi: hành động hoặc quá trình làm cho điều gì dễ dàng hơn; tạo điều kiện
words.definition_en: the action or process of making something easier
words.example_sentence: The facilitation of international trade agreements has reduced tariffs and increased cross-border commerce between developing and developed economies.
